MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Doris Henderson, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT BALDWIN CONTRACTING COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND/OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Baldwin Contracting Company, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication are denied as untimely. Defendant failed to provide proper notice pursuant to C.C.P. sections 437c(a) and 1010.6, CRC 2.251 and G.O. 158, which applies pursuant to the asbestos Case Management Order. Defendant's proof of service shows that defendant electronically served its motion on August 10, 2012. G.O. 158 explicitly states that the filing and service provisions of C.C.P. section 1010.6 shall apply. With a noticed hearing date of October 25, 2012, defendant failed to provide proper notice by failing to extend the notice period by two court days as required by C.C.P. 1010.6. Plaintiffs argued that defendant failed to provide proper notice so they did not waive such objection by also substantively opposing defendant's motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)
